info.title: 完善README命令与端到端测试

diffs.patch:
Index: plan.md
===================================================================
--- plan.md	
+++ plan.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,296 @@
+# Implementation Plan: trae-plugin-cc Fixes & Documentation Updates
+
+## Overview
+
+This plan covers code fixes, documentation updates, and testing for the trae-plugin-cc project. The work is organized into 5 parts, ordered by dependency.
+
+---
+
+## Part 1: Fix Code Issues
+
+### 1.1 `src/commands/rescue.ts` — Remove unused `--retries` and `--force` parameters
+
+**Problem:** Lines 48-59 parse `--retries` and `--force` from args, but these values are never used anywhere in the function. The code calls `runTraeCli` exactly once with no retry logic and no confirmation prompts to skip.
+
+**Files to change:**
+- `src/commands/rescue.ts` (lines 47-61)
+
+**Changes:**
+1. Remove lines 48-49 (`let retries = 3;` and `let force = false;`)
+2. Simplify the argument parsing loop to only parse `--context`:
+   ```typescript
+   export async function rescue(args: string[]) {
+     let context = '';
+
+     for (let i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {
+       if (args[i] === '--context' && args[i + 1]) {
+         context = args[i + 1];
+         i++;
+       }
+     }
+     // ... rest unchanged
+   }
+   ```
+3. Do NOT declare unused variables (`retries`, `force`). The code should only parse what it actually uses.
+
+**Rationale:** Don't pretend to support features that don't exist. If retry/force logic is added in the future, the parameters can be re-added at that time with proper implementation.
+
+---
+
+## Part 2: Update README 功能详解 Section
+
+### 2.1 Add `delete-smoke` to 会话管理 table (功能详解 section 3)
+
+**File:** `README.md` (around line 413, in the 会话管理 subcommand table)
+
+**Change:** After the `delete <ID>` row, add:
+
+| `delete-smoke` | 删除所有标题或ID包含"smoke"的会话 | `/trae:sessions delete-smoke` |
+
+### 2.2 Add `--resume=<ID>` and `--worktree=<NAME>` syntax variants
+
+**File:** `README.md` (around lines 295-299, in the 执行模式 table)
+
+**Changes:**
+- Update the `--resume` row to note both formats:
+  ```
+  | 会话恢复 | `--resume [ID]` / `--resume=<ID>` | 恢复之前的会话继续执行 |
+  ```
+- Update the `--worktree` row to note both formats:
+  ```
+  | Worktree 隔离 | `--worktree [NAME]` / `--worktree=<NAME>` | 在隔离的 git worktree 中执行，不影响主分支 |
+  ```
+
+### 2.3 Update rescue command documentation — remove `--retries` and `--force`
+
+**File:** `README.md` (around lines 507-513, in the 故障恢复 section)
+
+**Current table:**
+| 参数 | 说明 |
+|------|------|
+| `--context <TEXT>` | 附加上下文信息 |
+| `--retries <N>` | 重试次数 |
+| `--force` | 强制执行 |
+
+**New table (remove non-functional parameters):**
+| 参数 | 说明 |
+|------|------|
+| `--context <TEXT>` | 附加上下文信息 |
+
+### 2.4 Add hooks command documentation (internal/advanced section)
+
+**File:** `README.md` (after section 7 故障恢复, before 命令参考)
+
+**Add new section:**
+
+```markdown
+### 8. 钩子处理 (`/trae:hooks`) — 内部命令
+
+此命令由 `hooks/hooks.json` 内部调用，用于处理 Claude Code 生命周期事件。用户通常不需要手动触发。
+
+**支持的子命令**:
+
+| 子命令 | 触发钩子 | 对应脚本 |
+|--------|---------|---------|
+| `session-start` | `SessionStart` | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` |
+| `session-end` | `SessionEnd` | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` |
+| `stop-gate` | `Stop` | `stop-review-gate-hook.mjs` |
+
+**钩子映射关系**:
+
+| hooks.json 钩子 | 触发时机 | 脚本 | 传递参数 |
+|----------------|---------|------|---------|
+| `SessionStart` | Claude Code 会话启动 | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` | `SessionStart` |
+| `SessionEnd` | Claude Code 会话结束 | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` | `SessionEnd` |
+| `Stop` | 用户停止操作 | `stop-review-gate-hook.mjs` | 无 |
+| `PostToolUse` | 执行 `/trae:review` 后 | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` | `PostReview` |
+
+> **注意**: `PostToolUse` 钩子在 hooks.json 中直接调用 `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs PostReview`，不经过 `hooks.ts` 的 hookMap。这是故意的设计，因为 hooks.json 命令绕过 CLI 直接执行脚本。
+```
+
+### 2.5 Update 命令参考 section at the bottom
+
+**File:** `README.md` (around lines 561-578, 会话管理 reference table)
+
+**Changes to 会话管理 table:**
+Add `delete-smoke` row after `delete`:
+
+| 动作 | 说明 | 必需参数 |
+|------|------|---------|
+| `delete-smoke` | 删除所有包含"smoke"的会话 | — |
+
+**File:** `README.md` (around lines 597-605, 其他命令 section)
+
+**Update `/trae:rescue` line to remove non-functional parameters:**
+```
+/trae:rescue [--context <text>]  # 故障恢复
+```
+
+---
+
+## Part 3: Update commands/sessions.md
+
+**File:** `commands/sessions.md`
+
+**Change 1 — Actions list (around line 22):**
+Add `delete-smoke` to the Actions list:
+```
+- `delete-smoke`: 删除所有标题或ID包含"smoke"的会话
+```
+
+**Change 2 — Examples (around line 38):**
+Add example for delete-smoke:
+```bash
+/trae:sessions delete-smoke
+```
+
+---
+
+## Part 4: Run Existing Tests
+
+**Command:**
+```bash
+npm test
+```
+
+**Expected outcome:** All existing tests should pass. The test files are:
+- `tests/utils.test.ts`
+- `tests/commands/setup.test.ts`
+- `tests/commands/review.test.ts`
+- `tests/commands/run.test.ts`
+- `tests/commands/jobs.test.ts`
+
+**Note:** There are no existing tests for `rescue.ts`, `sessions.ts`, or `hooks.ts`. If tests fail after code changes, investigate whether the failure is pre-existing.
+
+---
+
+## Part 5: End-to-End Testing
+
+Since `trae-cli` is NOT installed on this system, we test what's feasible without it.
+
+### 5.1 Build the project
+
+```bash
+npm run build
+```
+
+Verify `dist/index.js` is generated and executable.
+
+### 5.2 Test argument parsing via CLI help output
+
+Run each command with `--help` or no args to verify command routing works:
+
+```bash
+# Test main entry point
+node dist/index.js
+
+# Test sessions command (no trae-cli needed — reads filesystem)
+node dist/index.js sessions
+# Expected: shows usage with delete-smoke listed
+
+node dist/index.js sessions list --limit 1
+# Expected: outputs session table (may be empty if no sessions exist)
+
+node dist/index.js sessions find
+# Expected: "请提供搜索关键词"
+
+node dist/index.js sessions delete
+# Expected: "请提供会话 ID"
+
+# Test rescue command (no trae-cli needed for argument parsing)
+node dist/index.js rescue
+# Expected: 🔧 [Trae Plugin] Rescue Mode ... (will fail at runTraeCli step, which is expected)
+
+node dist/index.js rescue --context "test context"
+# Expected: shows context in output before failing at runTraeCli
+
+node dist/index.js rescue --retries 5 --force
+# Expected: these flags should now cause an error or be ignored (after fix, they are silently ignored as unknown args)
+
+# Test jobs command (filesystem-based, no trae-cli needed)
+node dist/index.js status
+# Expected: shows background task status
+
+# Test hooks command
+node dist/index.js hooks
+# Expected: usage error about hook type
+
+node dist/index.js hooks session-start
+# Expected: runs lifecycle hook script
+
+node dist/index.js hooks stop-gate
+# Expected: runs stop-review-gate script
+
+node dist/index.js hooks unknown-hook
+# Expected: "Unknown hook type" error
+```
+
+### 5.3 Verify rescue.ts fix
+
+After removing `--retries` and `--force` parsing:
+```bash
+# Verify the parameter still appears in args (silently ignored since it's not parsed)
+node dist/index.js rescue --retries 5 2>&1 | head -5
+```
+
+The command should still work (fail at the trae-cli call step, but that's expected). The key thing is no TypeScript compilation errors from unused variables.
+
+### 5.4 Verify documentation consistency
+
+After all changes, manually verify:
+1. `README.md` 功能详解 section: `delete-smoke` is in the 会话管理 table
+2. `README.md` 功能详解 section: `--resume` and `--worktree` show both syntax variants
+3. `README.md` 故障恢复 section: `--retries` and `--force` are removed from the parameters table
+4. `README.md`: hooks internal command section exists with full table
+5. `README.md` 命令参考: `delete-smoke` is in sessions table
+6. `commands/sessions.md`: `delete-smoke` is in Actions list and Examples
+
+### 5.5 Test error handling paths
+
+```bash
+# Invalid session action
+node dist/index.js sessions invalid-action
+# Expected: shows full usage help including delete-smoke
+
+# Missing required args
+node dist/index.js sessions detail
+# Expected: "请提供会话 ID"
+
+node dist/index.js sessions conversation
+# Expected: "请提供会话 ID"
+
+node dist/index.js sessions tools
+# Expected: "请提供会话 ID"
+
+node dist/index.js sessions context
+# Expected: "请提供会话 ID"
+```
+
+---
+
+## Execution Order
+
+```
+1. Fix rescue.ts (Part 1)
+   ↓
+2. Update README.md (Part 2)
+   ↓
+3. Update commands/sessions.md (Part 3)
+   ↓
+4. Build & run existing tests (Part 4)
+   ↓
+5. Run end-to-end tests (Part 5)
+```
+
+Parts 2 and 3 can be done in parallel since they are independent documentation changes. Part 4 depends on Part 1 (code change). Part 5 depends on Parts 1-3 (need built binary + updated docs).
+
+---
+
+## Risk Assessment
+
+| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
+|------|--------|------------|
+| `npm test` fails due to pre-existing issues | Medium | Run tests BEFORE making changes to establish baseline |
+| `trae-cli` not installed prevents full rescue test | Low | Rescue command will fail at `runTraeCli` — expected behavior; we verify argument parsing and output formatting instead |
+| README table formatting breaks after edits | Low | Preview rendered markdown after changes |
+| hooks.ts mapping gap for PostReview | None | Not a bug — hooks.json calls script directly, bypassing hooks.ts. We document this in the new hooks section. |

parts.text: 深度理解本项目所有命令功能，如果readme “功能详解”中有不完整的命令，需要更新。然后根据readme中所有命令功能和所有参数，进行完备的模拟真人操作的端到端测试，不能偷懒，必须真实的完成每个功能项的全部功能，避免人真实使用时遇到bug。

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # trae-plugin-cc
2: 
3: 在 Claude Code 中无缝使用字节 Trae Agent (trae-cli) 的插件。支持任务委托、代码审查、会话管理、ACP 协议通信，实现与 Claude Code 原生功能一致的体验。
4: 
5: ## 功能概览
6: 
7: | 功能 | 说明 | 核心文件 |
8: |------|------|----------|
9: | 任务执行 | 将自然语言任务委托给 Trae Agent，支持 YOLO 模式、会话恢复、隔离工作树 | `src/commands/run.ts` |
10: | 代码审查 | 自动获取 git diff 提交审查，支持标准/对抗性审查模式，智能检测基准分支 | `src/commands/review.ts` |
11: | 会话管理 | 读取 trae-cli 历史会话、对话历史、工具调用记录、上下文摘要 | `src/commands/sessions.ts` |
12: | ACP 协议 | 通过 ACP (Agent Communication Protocol) 与 Trae Agent 交互，支持流式执行 | `src/commands/acp.ts` |
13: | 上下文注入 | 将已有会话上下文注入到新任务中，实现跨会话连续性 | `src/utils/context-bridge.ts` |
14: | MCP 工具 | Claude AI 自主调用 trae-cli，用户无需手动触发 | `.mcp.json` |
15: | 后台任务 | 支持后台执行长时间任务，可查询状态、获取结果、取消任务 | `src/commands/jobs.ts` |
16: | 故障恢复 | 分析失败任务并提供诊断建议 | `src/commands/rescue.ts` |
17: 
18: ## 示例
19: 
20: ### 1: 对抗性代码审查
21: 
22: ```bash
23: /trae:adversarial-review
24: ```
25: 极度严苛的审查模式，专门挑刺、质疑假设、主动寻找安全漏洞和性能瓶颈。
26: 
27: ### 2: Token 额度互补
28: 
29: ```bash
30: /trae:run "重构大型模块" --yolo
31: ```
32: 额度不足时，无缝切换到 trae-cli 账号额度继续工作。
33: 
34: ### 3: 上下文共享
35: 
36: ```bash
37: /trae:run "优化登录模块" --inject-context <session-id>
38: ```
39: 已理解的项目上下文直接注入 Trae，无需重新分析。
40: 
41: ### 4: 任务委托
42: 
43: ```bash
44: /trae:run "重构用户模块" --yolo
45: ```
46: 将编码任务委托给 Trae Agent，体验与原生功能一致。
47: 
48: ### 5: 代码审查
49: 
50: ```bash
51: /trae:review
52: ```
53: 自动获取 git diff，提交给 Trae 进行专业代码审查。
54: 
55: ### 6: 会话管理
56: 
57: ```bash
58: /trae:run "继续任务" --resume
59: ```
60: 恢复历史会话，无需记忆 session ID。
61: 
62: ### 7: ACP 协议通信
63: 
64: ```bash
65: /trae:acp run "分析代码质量"
66: ```
67: 通过 ACP 协议实现跨框架 Agent 协作。
68: 
69: ### 8: 后台任务
70: 
71: ```bash
72: /trae:run "分析整个代码库" --background
73: ```
74: 长时间任务后台执行，不阻塞当前工作流。
75: 
76: ## 前置条件
77: 
78: - [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code) CLI 已安装
79: - [trae-cli](https://docs.trae.cn/cli) 已安装并完成 auth 认证
80: 
81: ```bash
82: # 验证 trae-cli 是否可用
83: trae-cli --help
84: 
85: # 验证认证状态（需看到模型名称和登录地址）
86: cat ~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml
87: ```
88: 
89: ## 安装
90: 
91: ### 方式 1: 通过 Claude Code Marketplace 安装（推荐）
92: 
93: ```bash
94: # 步骤 1: 添加 Marketplace
95: claude plugin marketplace add https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc
96: 
97: # 步骤 2: 安装插件
98: claude plugin install trae
99: 
100: # 步骤 3: 验证安装
101: claude plugin list | grep trae
102: ```
103: 
104: 安装范围选项：
105: - `--scope user`（默认）: 全局可用
106: - `--scope project`: 仅当前项目可用
107: - `--scope local`: 仅当前会话可用
108: 
109: ### 方式 2: 从本地目录安装
110: 
111: ```bash
112: # 步骤 1: 克隆并编译
113: git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
114: cd trae-plugin-cc
115: npm install
116: npm run build
117: 
118: # 步骤 2: 添加本地 Marketplace
119: claude plugin marketplace add /path/to/trae-plugin-cc
120: 
121: # 步骤 3: 安装插件
122: claude plugin install trae
123: ```
124: 
125: ### 方式 3: 手动验证插件
126: 
127: ```bash
128: # 验证插件清单是否合法
129: claude plugin validate /path/to/trae-plugin-cc
130: # 应输出: ✔ Validation passed
131: ```
132: 
133: ## 安装后配置与验证
134: 
135: ### 步骤 1: 验证 trae-cli 认证
136: 
137: ```bash
138: # 在 Claude Code 中运行
139: /trae:setup
140: ```
141: 
142: 预期输出：
143: ```
144: 检查 trae-cli 状态...
145: 
146: ✅ trae-cli 已安装并可用！
147: 
148: ## 认证状态
149: 
150:   已认证: ✅
151:   配置文件: ~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml (存在)
152:   模型: GLM-5.1
153:   登录地址: https://console.enterprise.trae.cn
154: 
155:   已允许的工具: Edit, Write
156: 
157: ## ACP/MCP 服务
158: 
159:   ACP Server: trae-cli acp serve
160:   MCP Server: trae-cli mcp serve
161: ```
162: 
163: 如果认证状态为 ❌，请先运行 `trae-cli` 完成登录。
164: 
165: ### 步骤 2: 验证 MCP 工具
166: 
167: 插件安装后，`.mcp.json` 中定义的 4 个 MCP 工具自动注册到 Claude Code：
168: 
169: | 工具 | 说明 | 触发方式 |
170: |------|------|---------|
171: | `trae_run` | 执行任务 | Claude AI 自主调用 或 `/trae:run` |
172: | `trae_review` | 代码审查 | Claude AI 自主调用 或 `/trae:review` |
173: | `trae_sessions` | 会话管理 | Claude AI 自主调用 或 `/trae:sessions` |
174: | `trae_acp` | ACP 协议管理 | Claude AI 自主调用 或 `/trae:acp` |
175: 
176: ### 步骤 3: 验证 ACP 配置
177: 
178: ```bash
179: # 检查 ACP Server 状态
180: /trae:acp status
181: 
182: # 启动 ACP Server
183: /trae:acp start
184: 
185: # 发现可用 Agent
186: /trae:acp agents
187: ```
188: 
189: ACP Server 支持的参数（与 `trae-cli acp serve` 一致）：
190: 
191: | 参数 | 说明 | 示例 |
192: |------|------|------|
193: | `--yolo` | 跳过工具权限确认 | `/trae:acp start --yolo` |
194: | `--allowed-tool` | 允许的工具 | `/trae:acp start --allowed-tool Bash` |
195: | `--disabled-tool` | 禁用的工具（默认禁用 AskUserQuestion） | `/trae:acp start --disabled-tool AskUserQuestion` |
196: 
197: ### 步骤 4: 验证 MCP Server 配置
198: 
199: trae-cli 也支持 MCP Server 模式：
200: 
201: ```bash
202: # 直接启动 MCP Server（COCO 协议）
203: trae-cli mcp serve
204: 
205: # 添加 MCP Server 到配置
206: trae-cli mcp add-json 'my-server' '{"command":"npx","args":["my-mcp-server"]}'
207: ```
208: 
209: ## 无缝使用指南
210: 
211: ### 集成架构
212: 
213: ```
214: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
215: │                        Claude Code                                   │
216: │                                                                      │
217: │  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
218: │  │  ① 斜杠命令 (commands/*.md)     用户主动触发                    │ │
219: │  │     /trae:run, /trae:review, /trae:sessions, /trae:acp        │ │
220: │  ├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │
221: │  │  ② MCP 工具 (.mcp.json)        Claude AI 自主决策调用          │ │
222: │  │     trae_run, trae_review, trae_sessions, trae_acp             │ │
223: │  ├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │
224: │  │  ③ 钩子 (hooks/hooks.json)     生命周期事件自动触发            │ │
225: │  │     SessionStart, SessionEnd, Stop, PostToolUse                │ │
226: │  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
227: │                           │                                          │
228: │  ┌────────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐ │
229: │  │  TraeExecutor → trae-cli 子进程 (继承 auth token)              │ │
230: │  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
231: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
232: ```
233: 
234: ### 方式 A: 斜杠命令（用户主动触发）
235: 
236: ```bash
237: # 执行任务
238: /trae:run "重构用户认证模块"
239: 
240: # YOLO 模式（跳过工具权限确认，体验与 Claude Code 原生一致）
241: /trae:run "修复登录bug" --yolo
242: 
243: # 代码审查（自动获取 git diff）
244: /trae:review
245: 
246: # 对抗性审查
247: /trae:adversarial-review
248: 
249: # 恢复会话
250: /trae:run "继续之前的任务" --resume
251: 
252: # 查看历史会话
253: /trae:sessions list
254: 
255: # 通过 ACP 执行
256: /trae:acp start
257: /trae:acp run "分析代码质量"
258: ```
259: 
260: ### 方式 B: MCP 工具调用（AI 自主决策，用户无感）
261: 
262: Claude AI 根据对话上下文自主调用 MCP 工具，用户无需输入斜杠命令：
263: 
264: ```
265: 用户: "帮我审查一下当前代码变更"
266:   → Claude AI 自动调用 trae_review
267:   → 体验与 Claude Code 原生 /review 完全一致
268: 
269: 用户: "用 Trae Agent 重构认证模块"
270:   → Claude AI 自动调用 trae_run, prompt="重构认证模块"
271: 
272: 用户: "我之前用 Trae 做了什么？"
273:   → Claude AI 自动调用 trae_sessions, action="list"
274: ```
275: 
276: ### 方式 C: 钩子自动触发（完全无感）
277: 
278: | 钩子 | 触发时机 | 行为 |
279: |------|---------|------|
280: | `SessionStart` | Claude Code 启动 | 检查 trae-cli 状态 |
281: | `SessionEnd` | Claude Code 退出 | 清理会话资源 |
282: | `Stop` | 用户停止操作 | 触发审查门禁 |
283: | `PostToolUse` | 执行 `/trae:review` 后 | 记录审查结果 |
284: 
285: ## 功能详解
286: 
287: ### 1. 任务执行 (`/trae:run`)
288: 
289: 将自然语言任务委托给 Trae Agent 执行，支持多种执行模式和高级配置。
290: 
291: **执行模式**:
292: 
293: | 模式 | 参数 | 说明 |
294: |------|------|------|
295: | 前台执行 | (默认) | 阻塞当前会话，实时输出结果 |
296: | 后台执行 | `--background` | 不阻塞当前会话，适合长时间任务 |
297: | YOLO 模式 | `--yolo` / `-y` | 自动确认所有工具权限，无需人工干预 |
298: | 会话恢复 | `--resume [ID]` | 恢复之前的会话继续执行 |
299: | Worktree 隔离 | `--worktree` | 在隔离的 git worktree 中执行，不影响主分支 |
300: 
301: **高级参数**:
302: 
303: | 参数 | 说明 | 示例 |
304: |------|------|------|
305: | `--session-id <ID>` | 指定会话 ID | `--session-id my-session` |
306: | `--allowed-tool <TOOL>` | 自动批准的工具（可多次指定） | `--allowed-tool Bash --allowed-tool Edit` |
307: | `--disallowed-tool <TOOL>` | 自动拒绝的工具 | `--disallowed-tool AskUserQuestion` |
308: | `--query-timeout <DURATION>` | 单次查询超时 | `--query-timeout 5m` |
309: | `--bash-tool-timeout <DURATION>` | Bash 工具超时 | `--bash-tool-timeout 30s` |
310: | `--inject-context <SESSION_ID>` | 注入其他会话的上下文 | `--inject-context abc123` |
311: | `-c KEY=VALUE` | 覆盖配置项 | `-c model.name=GLM-4` |
312: | `--json` | 输出结构化 JSON 结果 | `--json` |
313: 
314: **使用示例**:
315: 
316: ```bash
317: # 基本任务执行
318: /trae:run "重构用户认证模块"
319: 
320: # YOLO 模式 - 自动确认所有操作
321: /trae:run "修复登录bug" --yolo
322: 
323: # 后台执行长时间任务
324: /trae:run "生成项目文档" --background
325: 
326: # 恢复最近的会话
327: /trae:run "继续之前的任务" --resume
328: 
329: # 恢复指定会话
330: /trae:run "继续" --resume 0d3cbdc3-e365-468e-982c-fb3d5849f5cc
331: 
332: # 在隔离的 worktree 中实验性修改
333: /trae:run "实验性重构" --worktree
334: 
335: # 注入其他会话的上下文
336: /trae:run "继续优化" --inject-context abc123
337: 
338: # 获取结构化输出
339: /trae:run "分析项目" --json
340: ```
341: 
342: **内部实现**:
343: - `TraeExecutor` 类管理 trae-cli 子进程生命周期
344: - 自动继承 `~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml` 中的认证信息
345: - 后台任务存储在 `.claude-trae-plugin/` 目录
346: 
347: ---
348: 
349: ### 2. 代码审查 (`/trae:review`)
350: 
351: 自动获取 git diff 并提交给 Trae Agent 进行专业代码审查。
352: 
353: **智能特性**:
354: - **自动检测基准分支**: 分析 git 远程分支，智能选择 `main`/`master`/`develop` 作为基准
355: - **变更大小估算**: 自动估算变更规模，大型变更自动启用后台模式
356: - **对抗性审查模式**: 极度严苛的审查，专门挑刺和质疑假设
357: 
358: **审查模式对比**:
359: 
360: | 模式 | 命令 | 审查风格 |
361: |------|------|----------|
362: | 标准审查 | `/trae:review` | 专业代码审查，找出错误和改进建议 |
363: | 对抗性审查 | `/trae:adversarial-review` | 极度严苛，专门挑刺、质疑假设、找出安全漏洞 |
364: 
365: **支持的参数**:
366: 
367: | 参数 | 说明 |
368: |------|------|
369: | `--base <BRANCH>` | 指定基准分支（默认自动检测） |
370: | `--background` | 后台执行审查 |
371: | `--yolo` / `-y` | YOLO 模式 |
372: | `--json` | 结构化输出 |
373: | `--session-id <ID>` | 指定会话 ID |
374: 
375: **使用示例**:
376: 
377: ```bash
378: # 标准审查（自动检测基准分支）
379: /trae:review
380: 
381: # 指定基准分支
382: /trae:review --base develop
383: 
384: # 对抗性审查
385: /trae:adversarial-review
386: 
387: # 后台执行大型审查
388: /trae:review --background
389: ```
390: 
391: **内部实现**:
392: - `detectBaseBranch()` 自动检测基准分支
393: - `estimateReviewSize()` 估算变更规模
394: - 大型变更自动建议后台模式
395: 
396: ---
397: 
398: ### 3. 会话管理 (`/trae:sessions`)
399: 
400: 管理和查询 Trae Agent 的历史会话，支持多种维度的查询和分析。
401: 
402: **支持的子命令**:
403: 
404: | 子命令 | 说明 | 示例 |
405: |--------|------|------|
406: | `list` | 列出所有会话（默认） | `/trae:sessions list --limit 10` |
407: | `recent` | 查看最近会话 | `/trae:sessions recent` |
408: | `detail <ID>` | 查看会话详情 | `/trae:sessions detail abc123` |
409: | `conversation <ID>` | 获取对话历史 | `/trae:sessions conversation abc123 --limit 50` |
410: | `tools <ID>` | 获取工具调用记录 | `/trae:sessions tools abc123` |
411: | `context <ID>` | 获取完整上下文摘要 | `/trae:sessions context abc123` |
412: | `find <TOPIC>` | 按主题搜索会话 | `/trae:sessions find "重构"` |
413: | `delete <ID>` | 删除会话 | `/trae:sessions delete abc123` |
414: 
415: **筛选选项**:
416: - `--cwd <PATH>`: 按工作目录筛选
417: - `--limit <N>`: 限制返回数量
418: 
419: **数据来源**:
420: 直接读取 `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` 目录：
421: - `session.json`: 会话元数据（ID、标题、工作目录、模型、权限模式）
422: - `events.jsonl`: 完整事件流（对话消息、工具调用、状态变更）
423: 
424: **内部实现**:
425: - `SessionReader` 类直接读取文件系统，零延迟
426: - 解析 JSONL 事件流，聚合对话、工具调用、上下文信息
427: 
428: ---
429: 
430: ### 4. ACP 协议管理 (`/trae:acp`)
431: 
432: 管理 ACP (Agent Communication Protocol) 服务器，实现跨框架 Agent 协作。
433: 
434: **支持的子命令**:
435: 
436: | 子命令 | 说明 | 示例 |
437: |--------|------|------|
438: | `start` | 启动 ACP Server | `/trae:acp start --yolo` |
439: | `stop` | 停止 ACP Server | `/trae:acp stop` |
440: | `status` | 查看服务器状态 | `/trae:acp status` |
441: | `agents` | 发现可用 Agent | `/trae:acp agents` |
442: | `run "任务"` | 通过 ACP 执行任务 | `/trae:acp run "分析代码"` |
443: | `stream "任务"` | 流式执行任务（实时输出） | `/trae:acp stream "实时分析"` |
444: 
445: **ACP Server 参数**:
446: 
447: | 参数 | 说明 |
448: |------|------|
449: | `--yolo` | 跳过工具权限确认 |
450: | `--allowed-tool <NAME>` | 允许的工具 |
451: | `--disabled-tool <NAME>` | 禁用的工具（默认禁用 AskUserQuestion） |
452: 
453: **ACP REST API 端点**:
454: 
455: | 端点 | 方法 | 说明 |
456: |------|------|------|
457: | `/agents` | GET | 发现可用 Agent |
458: | `/runs` | POST | 创建执行 |
459: | `/runs/stream` | POST | 流式执行（SSE） |
460: | `/runs/{id}` | GET | 查询执行状态 |
461: 
462: **内部实现**:
463: - `AcpServerManager` 管理 ACP Server 生命周期
464: - `AcpClient` 封装 REST API 调用
465: - 支持 SSE 流式输出
466: 
467: ---
468: 
469: ### 5. 后台任务管理
470: 
471: 管理后台执行的长时间任务。
472: 
473: | 命令 | 说明 | 示例 |
474: |------|------|------|
475: | `/trae:status` | 查看所有后台任务状态 | `/trae:status` |
476: | `/trae:result <ID>` | 获取任务执行结果 | `/trae:result 1633022...` |
477: | `/trae:cancel <ID>` | 取消正在运行的任务 | `/trae:cancel 1633022...` |
478: 
479: **任务状态**:
480: - 运行中
481: - 已完成或已中止
482: - 无法验证状态
483: 
484: **任务存储**: `.claude-trae-plugin/` 目录
485: - `<timestamp>.pid`: 进程 ID 文件
486: - `<timestamp>.log`: 日志文件
487: 
488: ---
489: 
490: ### 6. 环境配置 (`/trae:setup`)
491: 
492: 检查 trae-cli 安装和认证状态。
493: 
494: **检查项**:
495: - trae-cli 是否安装
496: - 认证状态（读取 `~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml`）
497: - 当前模型
498: - 已允许的工具
499: - 已安装的插件
500: 
501: ---
502: 
503: ### 7. 故障恢复 (`/trae:rescue`)
504: 
505: 分析失败任务并提供恢复建议。
506: 
507: **支持的参数**:
508: 
509: | 参数 | 说明 |
510: |------|------|
511: | `--context <TEXT>` | 附加上下文信息 |
512: | `--retries <N>` | 重试次数 |
513: | `--force` | 强制执行 |
514: 
515: **工作流程**:
516: 1. 收集最近的错误日志
517: 2. 获取当前 git 状态
518: 3. 分析最近提交
519: 4. 提交给 Trae Agent 诊断
520:

607: ## 三种上下文获取路径
608: 
609: ### 路径 1: 文件系统直读
610: 
611: 直接读取 `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` 下的文件，零延迟、无需启动进程。
612: 
613: | 文件 | 内容 |
614: |------|------|
615: | `session.json` | 会话元数据（ID、标题、工作目录、模型、权限模式） |
616: | `events.jsonl` | 完整事件流（对话消息、工具调用、状态变更） |
617: 
618: ```bash
619: /trae:sessions list           # 读取 session.json
620: /trae:sessions conversation   # 解析 events.jsonl 的 message 事件
621: /trae:sessions tools          # 解析 events.jsonl 的 tool_call 事件
622: /trae:sessions context        # 综合分析所有事件
623: ```
624: 
625: ### 路径 2: --json 结构化输出
626: 
627: 通过 `trae-cli -p --json` 执行任务，获取完整的结构化 JSON 输出，含 `session_id` 可追踪。
628: 
629: ```bash
630: /trae:run "任务" --json
631: ```
632: 
633: ### 路径 3: ACP REST API
634: 
635: 通过 `trae-cli acp serve` 启动 ACP Server，使用标准 REST + SSE 协议通信。
636: 
637: | API 端点 | 说明 |
638: |----------|------|
639: | `GET /agents` | 发现可用 Agent |
640: | `POST /runs` | 创建执行（含 session 管理） |
641: | `POST /runs/stream` | 流式执行（SSE） |
642: | `GET /runs/{id}` | 查询执行状态 |
643: 
644: ```bash
645: /trae:acp start              # 启动 ACP Server
646: /trae:acp agents             # 发现 Agent
647: /trae:acp run "任务"         # 执行任务
648: /trae:acp stream "任务"      # 流式执行
649: ```
650: 
651: ### 路径选择指南
652: 
653: | 场景 | 推荐路径 |
654: |------|---------|
655: | 查询历史会话 | 路径 1（文件系统直读） |
656: | 执行任务并获取结构化结果 | 路径 2（--json） |
657: | 跨框架 Agent 协作 | 路径 3（ACP） |
658: | 恢复会话继续对话 | 路径 2（--resume） |
659: | 实时追踪执行进度 | 路径 3（SSE 流式） |
660: 
661: ## 认证机制
662: 
663: trae-cli 使用 OAuth2 Auth 认证（非 API Key），认证配置存储在 `~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml`：
664: 
665: ```yaml
666: allowed_tools:
667:   - Edit
668:   - Write
669: model:
670:   name: GLM-5.1
671: plugins:
672:   - enabled: true
673:     name: superpowers
674:     source: wangxumarshall/superpowers
675:     type: github
676: trae_login_base_url: https://console.enterprise.trae.cn
677: ```
678: 
679: 插件通过 `AuthBridge` 自动检测认证状态，无需用户手动配置 API Key。trae-cli 子进程自动继承 auth token。
680:

730: ## 核心工具类
731: 
732: ### TraeExecutor (`src/utils/trae-executor.ts`)
733: 
734: 管理 trae-cli 子进程的核心执行器。
735: 
736: **主要功能**:
737: - 子进程生命周期管理
738: - 前台/后台执行模式切换
739: - 参数构建和环境变量传递
740: - 输出捕获和日志记录
741: - JSON 输出解析
742: 
743: **接口定义**:
744: 
745: ```typescript
746: interface TraeTaskConfig {
747:   prompt: string;
748:   background?: boolean;
749:   jsonOutput?: boolean;
750:   yolo?: boolean;
751:   allowedTools?: string[];
752:   disallowedTools?: string[];
753:   sessionId?: string;
754:   resume?: string;
755:   worktree?: string;
756:   queryTimeout?: string;
757:   bashToolTimeout?: string;
758:   configOverrides?: Record<string, string>;
759: }
760: 
761: interface TraeTaskResult {
762:   taskId: string;
763:   output: string;
764:   exitCode: number | null;
765:   sessionId?: string;
766:   duration: number;
767:   jsonOutput?: any;
768: }
769: ```
770: 
771: ---
772: 
773: ### SessionReader (`src/utils/session-reader.ts`)
774: 
775: 直接读取文件系统获取会话数据，零延迟访问。
776: 
777: **主要功能**:
778: - 列出所有会话
779: - 获取会话元数据和事件
780: - 解析对话历史
781: - 聚合工具调用记录
782: - 生成上下文摘要
783: 
784: **数据源**: `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/`
785: 
786: ---
787: 
788: ### AuthBridge (`src/utils/auth-bridge.ts`)
789: 
790: 自动检测认证状态，无需用户手动配置。
791: 
792: **主要功能**:
793: - 读取 `~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml` 配置
794: - 检测认证状态
795: - 获取模型、工具、插件配置
796: - 构建子进程环境变量
797: 
798: ---
799: 
800: ### ContextBridge (`src/utils/context-bridge.ts`)
801: 
802: 跨会话上下文注入，实现会话连续性。
803: 
804: **主要功能**:
805: - 构建会话摘要
806: - 注入上下文到新任务
807: - 支持会话恢复
808: 
809: ---
810: 
811: ### AcpServerManager (`src/utils/acp-server-manager.ts`)
812: 
813: ACP Server 生命周期管理。
814: 
815: **主要功能**:
816: - 启动/停止 ACP Server
817: - 管理服务器状态
818: - 获取 ACP Client
819: 
820: ---
821: 
822: ### AcpClient (`src/utils/acp-client.ts`)
823: 
824: ACP REST API 客户端封装。
825: 
826: **主要功能**:
827: - 健康检查
828: - 发现 Agent
829: - 执行任务
830: - 流式执行（SSE）
831: 
832: ---
833: 
834: ### BranchDetection (`src/utils/branch-detection.ts`)
835: 
836: Git 分支自动检测工具。
837: 
838: **主要功能**:
839: - 自动检测基准分支
840: - 估算变更大小
841: - 格式化估算结果
842: 
843: ## 钩子
844: 
845: | 钩子 | 触发时机 | 脚本 |
846: |------|---------|------|
847: | `SessionStart` | Claude Code 会话启动 | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` |
848: | `SessionEnd` | Claude Code 会话结束 | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` |
849: | `Stop` | 用户停止操作 | `stop-review-gate-hook.mjs` |
850: | `PostToolUse` | 执行 `/trae:review` 后 | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` |
851: 
852: ## 开发
853: 
854: ```bash
855: # 编译
856: npm run build
857: 
858: # 运行测试
859: npm test
860: 
861: # 直接运行 CLI
862: node dist/index.js <command> [args]
863: 
864: # 验证插件
865: claude plugin validate /path/to/trae-plugin-cc
866: ```
867: 
868: ## License
869: 
870: MIT

(End of file - total 870 lines)
</content>

metadata.preview:
# trae-plugin-cc

在 Claude Code 中无缝使用字节 Trae Agent (trae-cli) 的插件。支持任务委托、代码审查、会话管理、ACP 协议通信，实现与 Claude Code 原生功能一致的体验。

## 功能概览

| 功能 | 说明 | 核心文件 |
|------|------|----------|
| 任务执行 | 将自然语言任务委托给 Trae Agent，支持 YOLO 模式、会话恢复、隔离工作树 | `src/commands/run.ts` |
| 代码审查 | 自动获取 git diff 提交审查，支持标准/对抗性审查模式，智能检测基准分支 | `src/commands/review.ts` |
| 会话管理 | 读取 trae-cli 历史会话、对话历史、工具调用记录、上下文摘要 | `src/commands/sessions.ts` |
| ACP 协议 | 通过 ACP (Agent Communication Protocol) 与 Trae Agent 交互，支持流式执行 | `src/commands/acp.ts` |
| 上下文注入 | 将已有会话上下文注入到新任务中，实现跨会话连续性 | `src/utils/context-bridge.ts` |
| MCP 工具 | Claude AI 自主调用 trae-cli，用户无需手动触发 | `.mcp.json` |
| 后台任务 | 支持后台执行长时间任务，可查询状态、获取结果、取消任务 | `src/commands/jobs.ts` |
| 故障恢复 | 分析失败任务并提供诊断建议 | `src/commands/rescue.ts` |

## 示例

### 1: 对抗性代码审查

4: const executor = new TraeExecutor();
5: const bridge = new ContextBridge();
6: 
7: export async function runTask(args: string[]) {
8:   const config: TraeTaskConfig = { prompt: '' };
9:   const promptParts: string[] = [];
10: 
11:   for (let i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {
12:     const arg = args[i];
13: 
14:     if (arg === '--background') {
15:       config.background = true;
16:     } else if (arg === '--json') {
17:       config.jsonOutput = true;
18:     } else if (arg === '--yolo' || arg === '-y') {
19:       config.yolo = true;
20:     } else if (arg === '--resume' && args[i + 1] && !args[i + 1].startsWith('-')) {
21:       config.resume = args[i + 1];
22:       i++;
23:     } else if (arg === '--resume' || arg === '--resume=AUTO') {
24:       config.resume = 'AUTO';
25:     } else if (arg.startsWith('--resume=')) {
26:       config.resume = arg.substring('--resume='.length);
27:     } else if (arg === '--session-id' && args[i + 1]) {
28:       config.sessionId = args[i + 1];
29:       i++;
30:     } else if ((arg === '--worktree' || arg === '-w') && args[i + 1] && !args[i + 1].startsWith('-')) {
31:       config.worktree = args[i + 1];
32:       i++;
33:     } else if (arg === '--worktree' || arg === '-w') {
34:       config.worktree = '__auto__';
35:     } else if (arg.startsWith('--worktree=')) {
36:       config.worktree = arg.substring('--worktree='.length);
37:     } else if (arg === '--allowed-tool' && args[i + 1]) {
38:       config.allowedTools = config.allowedTools || [];
39:       config.allowedTools.push(args[i + 1]);
40:       i++;
41:     } else if (arg === '--disallowed-tool' && args[i + 1]) {
42:       config.disallowedTools = config.disallowedTools || [];
43:       config.disallowedTools.push(args[i + 1]);
44:       i++;
45:     } else if (arg === '--query-timeout' && args[i + 1]) {
46:       config.queryTimeout = args[i + 1];
47:       i++;
48:     } else if (arg === '--bash-tool-timeout' && args[i + 1]) {
49:       config.bashToolTimeout = args[i + 1];

51:     } else if (arg === '-c' && args[i + 1]) {

3: import { detectBaseBranch, estimateReviewSize, formatEstimate } from '../utils/branch-detection';
4: 
5: const executor = new TraeExecutor();
6: 
7: export async function review(args: string[], isAdversarial: boolean = false) {
8:     let baseBranch = 'main';
9:     const config: TraeTaskConfig = { prompt: '' };
10: 
11:     for (let i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {
12:         if (args[i] === '--base' && args[i + 1]) {
13:             baseBranch = args[i + 1];

15:         }

17:             config.background = true;
18:         }
19:         if (args[i] === '--yolo' || args[i] === '-y') {
20:             config.yolo = true;
21:         }
22:         if (args[i] === '--json') {
23:             config.jsonOutput = true;
24:         }
25:         if (args[i] === '--session-id' && args[i + 1]) {
26:             config.sessionId = args[i + 1];
27:             i++;
28:         }
29:     }
30: 
31:     if (!args.includes('--base')) {
32:         console.log('🔍 自动检测基准分支...');
33:         baseBranch = await detectBaseBranch();
34:     }
35: 
36:     console.log(`📊 分析变更大小...`);
37:     const estimate = await estimateReviewSize(baseBranch);
38:     console.log(formatEstimate(estimate));
39: 
40:     if (!config.background && estimate.recommendation.useBackground) {
41:         console.log('💡 自动启用后台模式 (使用 --background 覆盖)');
42:         config.background = true;
43:     }
44: 
45:     console.log(`\n获取与 ${baseBranch} 的差异...`);
46:     const diff = await getGitDiff(baseBranch);
47: 
48:     if (!diff.trim()) {
49:          console.log('没有检测到任何代码变更。');
50:          return;
51:     }
52: 
53:     let reviewPrompt = isAdversarial
54:         ? `作为一位极度严苛的对抗性代码审查员，请仔细检查以下变更。你需要专门挑刺、质疑假设、找出所有潜在的安全漏洞、性能瓶颈、逻辑错误或不符合最佳实践的地方。务必吹毛求疵，给出致命的反馈意见。`
55:         : `请对以下代码变更进行标准的专业代码审查。找出潜在的错误、性能问题、提出改进建议，并总结主要变动：`;
56: 
57:     config.prompt = `${reviewPrompt}\n\n代码变更如下:\n\`\`\`diff\n${diff}\n\`\`\``;
58: 
59:     console.log('提交代码审查请求到 Trae Agent...');
60:     try {
61:         const result = await executor.execute(config);
62: 
63:         if (config.jsonOutput && result.jsonOutput) {
64:             console.log('\n## 结构化审查结果\n');

36:   const options: { yolo?: boolean; allowedTools?: string[]; disabledTools?: string[] } = {};
37: 
38:   for (let i = 1; i < args.length; i++) {
39:     if (args[i] === '--yolo') {
40:       options.yolo = true;
41:     }
42:     if (args[i] === '--allowed-tool' && args[i + 1]) {
43:       options.allowedTools = options.allowedTools || [];
44:       options.allowedTools.push(args[i + 1]);
45:       i++;
46:     }
47:     if (args[i] === '--disabled-tool' && args[i + 1]) {
48:       options.disabledTools = options.disabledTools || [];
49:       options.disabledTools.push(args[i + 1]);
50:       i++;
51:     }
52:   }
53: 
54:   console.log('正在启动 ACP Server...');
55: 
56:   try {
57:     const result = await serverManager.start(options);
58:     console.log(`\n✅ ACP Server 已启动`);
59:     console.log(`  端口: ${result.port}`);
60:     console.log(`  地址: ${result.baseUrl}`);

1: import * as fs from 'fs';
2: import * as path from 'path';
3: 
4: const PLUGIN_DIR = path.join(process.cwd(), '.claude-trae-plugin');
5: 
6: export function getJobs() {
7:     if (!fs.existsSync(PLUGIN_DIR)) {
8:         return [];
9:     }
10: 
11:     const files = fs.readdirSync(PLUGIN_DIR);
12:     const pids = files.filter(f => f.endsWith('.pid')).map(f => f.replace('.pid', ''));
13: 
14:     return pids.map(pid => {
15:         const timestamp = parseInt(pid, 10);
16:         const logFile = path.join(PLUGIN_DIR, `${pid}.log`);
17:         const pidFile = path.join(PLUGIN_DIR, `${pid}.pid`);
18: 
19:         let status = '未知';
20:         if (fs.existsSync(pidFile)) {
21:              try {
22:                 const processId = fs.readFileSync(pidFile, 'utf-8').trim();
23:                 process.kill(parseInt(processId, 10), 0); // Check if process is running
24:                 status = '运行中';
25:              } catch (e: any) {
26:                  if (e.code === 'ESRCH') {
27:                      status = '已完成或已中止';
28:                  } else {
29:                      status = '无法验证状态';
30:                  }
31:              }
32:         } else {
33:             status = '已完成或已中止';
34:         }
35: 
36:         return { id: pid, timestamp, status, logFile, pidFile };
37:     });
38: }
39: 
40: export function status(args: string[]) {
41:     const jobs = getJobs();
42:     if (jobs.length === 0) {
43:         console.log('当前没有运行或记录的后台任务。');
44:         return;
45:     }
46: 
47:     console.log('后台任务状态:\n');
48:     jobs.forEach(job => {
49:         const date = new Date(job.timestamp).toLocaleString();
50:         console.log(`[ID: ${job.id}] (${date}) 状态: ${job.status}`);
51:     });
52: }
53: 
54: export function result(args: string[]) {
55:     const id = args[0];
56:     if (!id) {
57:         console.log('请提供任务 ID。例如: /trae:result 1633022... \n你可以用 /trae:status 获取任务 ID。');
58:         return;
59:     }
60: 
61:     const logFile = path.join(PLUGIN_DIR, `${id}.log`);
62:     if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) {
63:         console.log(`找不到 ID 为 ${id} 的日志文件。`);
64:         return;
65:     }
66: 
67:     const content = fs.readFileSync(logFile, 'utf-8');
68:     console.log(`任务 ${id} 的结果输出:\n`);
69:     console.log(content);
70: }
71: 
72: export function cancel(args: string[]) {
73:     const id = args[0];
74:     if (!id) {
75:         console.log('请提供要取消的任务 ID。例如: /trae:cancel 1633022... \n你可以用 /trae:status 获取任务 ID。');
76:         return;
77:     }
78: 
79:     const pidFile = path.join(PLUGIN_DIR, `${id}.pid`);
80:     if (!fs.existsSync(pidFile)) {
81:          console.log(`找不到 ID 为 ${id} 的任务记录。它可能已经完成或被清理。`);
82:          return;
83:     }
84: 
85:     try {
86:         const pidStr = fs.readFileSync(pidFile, 'utf-8').trim();
87:         const pid = parseInt(pidStr, 10);
88: 
89:         process.kill(pid, 'SIGKILL'); // Force kill
90:         console.log(`已发送强制终止信号给任务 ${id} (PID: ${pid})。`);
91:         fs.unlinkSync(pidFile); // Remove pid file
92:     } catch (e: any) {
93:         if (e.code === 'ESRCH') {
94:             console.log(`任务 ${id} 的进程已经不再运行。`);
95:         } else {
96:              console.error(`取消任务时发生错误: ${e.message}`);
97:         }
98:     }
99: }

1: import { execSync } from 'child_process';
2: import { existsSync, readdirSync, readFileSync } from 'fs';
3: import { join } from 'path';
4: import { runTraeCli } from '../utils';
5: 
6: const PLUGIN_DIR = '.claude-trae-plugin';
7: 
8: function getLastError(): string | null {
9:   const pluginDir = join(process.cwd(), PLUGIN_DIR);
10:   if (!existsSync(pluginDir)) return null;
11: 
12:   try {
13:     const files = readdirSync(pluginDir);
14:     const logs = files.filter(f => f.endsWith('.log'));
15: 
16:     if (logs.length === 0) return null;
17: 
18:     logs.sort().reverse();
19:     const latestLog = logs[0];
20:     const logPath = join(pluginDir, latestLog);
21: 
22:     return readFileSync(logPath, 'utf-8');
23:   } catch {
24:     return null;
25:   }
26: }
27: 
28: function getGitStatus(): string {
29:   try {
30:     // Fixed command, no user input - safe
31:     return execSync('git status --short', { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim();
32:   } catch {
33:     return '';
34:   }
35: }
36: 
37: function getRecentChanges(): string {
38:   try {
39:     // Fixed command, no user input - safe
40:     return execSync('git diff --stat -10', { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim();
41:   } catch {
42:     return '';
43:   }
44: }
45: 
46: export async function rescue(args: string[]) {
47:   let context = '';
48:   let retries = 3;
49:   let force = false;
50: 
51:   for (let i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {
52:     if (args[i] === '--context' && args[i + 1]) {
53:       context = args[i + 1];
54:       i++;
55:     } else if (args[i] === '--retries' && args[i + 1]) {
56:       retries = parseInt(args[i + 1]) || 3;
57:       i++;
58:     } else if (args[i] === '--force') {
59:       force = true;
60:     }
61:   }
62: 
63:   console.log('🔧 [Trae Plugin] Rescue Mode');
64:   console.log('─'.repeat(40));
65: 
66:   const lastError = getLastError();
67:   const gitStatus = getGitStatus();
68:   const recentChanges = getRecentChanges();
69: 
70:   console.log('📊 收集故障信息...');
71: 
72:   if (lastError) {
73:     console.log('\n📝 最近错误:');
74:     const errorLines = lastError.split('\n').slice(-10);
75:     console.log(errorLines.join('\n'));
76:   }
77: 
78:   if (gitStatus) {
79:     console.log('\n📁 当前变更:');
80:     console.log(gitStatus);
81:   }
82: 
83:   if (recentChanges) {
84:     console.log('\n📈 最近提交:');
85:     console.log(recentChanges);
86:   }
87: 
88:   if (context) {
89:     console.log('\n📋 用户提供上下文:');
90:     console.log(context);
91:   }
92: 
93:   console.log('\n🔍 正在分析问题...');
94: 
95:   const diagnosisPrompt = `作为 Trae Agent 的故障诊断助手，请分析以下失败上下文并提供恢复建议：
96: 
97: ${lastError ? `错误输出:\n${lastError}\n` : ''}
98: ${gitStatus ? `Git 状态:\n${gitStatus}\n` : ''}
99: ${context ? `附加上下文:\n${context}\n` : ''}
100: 
101: 请提供:
102: 1. 问题诊断: 可能的原因是什么？
103: 2. 恢复建议: 应该尝试什么操作？
104: 3. 预防建议: 如何避免类似问题？`;
105: 
106:   try {
107:     console.log('─'.repeat(40));
108:     const result = await runTraeCli(diagnosisPrompt, false);
109:     console.log('\n💡 诊断结果:');
110:     console.log(result);
111:   } catch (error: any) {
112:     console.error('❌ 诊断失败:', error.message);
113:   }
114: 
115:   console.log('─'.repeat(40));
116: }

(End of file - total 116 lines)

1: import { spawn } from 'child_process';
2: import path from 'path';
3: 
4: export async function handleHook(args: string[]) {
5:     const hookType = args[0];
6: 
7:     if (!hookType) {
8:         console.error('Usage: trae-plugin-cc hooks <session-start|session-end|stop-gate>');
9:         process.exit(1);
10:     }
11: 
12:     const hookMap: Record<string, { script: string; arg: string }> = {
13:         'session-start': { script: 'session-lifecycle-hook.mjs', arg: 'SessionStart' },
14:         'session-end': { script: 'session-lifecycle-hook.mjs', arg: 'SessionEnd' },
15:         'stop-gate': { script: 'stop-review-gate-hook.mjs', arg: '' },
16:     };
17: 
18:     const entry = hookMap[hookType];
19:     if (!entry) {
20:         console.error(`Unknown hook type: ${hookType}`);
21:         console.error(`Available: ${Object.keys(hookMap).join(', ')}`);
22:         process.exit(1);
23:     }
24: 
25:     const pluginRoot = process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT || path.join(__dirname, '..');
26:     const scriptPath = path.join(pluginRoot, 'scripts', entry.script);
27: 
28:     const spawnArgs = entry.arg ? [scriptPath, entry.arg] : [scriptPath];
29: 
30:     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
31:         const child = spawn('node', spawnArgs, {
32:             stdio: 'inherit',
33:             detached: false
34:         });
35: 
36:         child.on('close', (code) => {
37:             if (code === 0) {
38:                 resolve(undefined);
39:             } else {
40:                 reject(new Error(`Hook exited with code ${code}`));
41:             }
42:         });
43: 
44:         child.on('error', reject);
45:     });
46: }

(End of file - total 46 lines)
</content>

1: ---
2: description: 将任务委托给 Trae Agent 执行
3: allowed-tools: Bash(trae-cli:*)
4: ---
5: 
6: # /trae:run
7: 
8: **Description:**
9: 将任务描述直接交给 Trae Agent (`trae-cli`) 执行。支持会话恢复、工具控制、结构化输出、隔离工作树等高级选项。
10: 
11: **Usage:**
12: ```bash
13: /trae:run "自然语言任务描述" [options]
14: ```
15: 
16: **Options:**
17: - `--background`: 将任务放到后台运行
18: - `--json`: 返回结构化 JSON 输出 (含 session_id)
19: - `--yolo` / `-y`: YOLO 模式，跳过工具权限确认
20: - `--resume [SESSION_ID]`: 恢复会话，不指定 ID 则自动恢复最近会话
21: - `--session-id <id>`: 指定新会话 ID
22: - `--worktree [NAME]` / `-w`: 在隔离的 git worktree 中工作
23: - `--allowed-tool <name>`: 自动批准的工具 (可多次指定)
24: - `--disallowed-tool <name>`: 自动拒绝的工具 (可多次指定)
25: - `--query-timeout <duration>`: 单次查询超时 (如 30s, 5m)
26: - `--bash-tool-timeout <duration>`: Bash 工具超时
27: - `--inject-context <session-id>`: 注入指定会话的上下文到 prompt 中
28: - `-c k=v`: 覆盖配置项 (可多次指定)
29: 
30: **Examples:**
31: ```bash
32: /trae:run "重构用户模块"
33: /trae:run "修复bug" --yolo
34: /trae:run "生成文档" --background
35: /trae:run "分析项目" --json
36: /trae:run "继续任务" --resume
37: /trae:run "继续" --resume 0d3cbdc3-e365-468e-982c-fb3d5849f5cc
38: /trae:run "实验性修改" --worktree
39: /trae:run "执行脚本" --allowed-tool Bash --allowed-tool Edit
40: /trae:run "长任务" --query-timeout 5m
41: /trae:run "继续优化" --inject-context 0d3cbdc3-e365-468e-982c-fb3d5849f5cc
42: ```
43: 
44: **Internal Execution:**
45: ```bash
46: node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" run "任务描述" [options]
47: ```

(End of file - total 47 lines)
</content>

# /trae:run

**Description:**
将任务描述直接交给 Trae Agent (`trae-cli`) 执行。支持会话恢复、工具控制、结构化输出、隔离工作树等高级选项。

**Usage:**
```bash
/trae:run "自然语言任务描述" [options]
```

**Options:**
- `--background`: 将任务放到后台运行
- `--json`: 返回结构化 JSON 输出 (含 session_id)
- `--yolo` / `-y`: YOLO 模式，跳过工具权限确认

# /trae:adversarial-review

**Description:**
进行对抗性代码审查。Trae Agent 会专门挑刺、质疑假设、找出潜在的安全漏洞、性能瓶颈、逻辑错误等。

- `--background`: 将审查任务放到后台运行
- `--yolo` / `-y`: YOLO 模式
- `--json`: 返回结构化 JSON 输出

# /trae:rescue

**Description:**
当任务执行失败时，使用 Trae Agent 进行故障诊断。它会收集最近的错误日志、Git 状态等信息，并让 Trae 分析问题原因和恢复建议。

**Usage:**
```bash
/trae:rescue [--context "额外信息"] [--retries 3] [--force]
```

**Options:**
- `--context <text>`: 提供额外的上下文信息帮助诊断
- `--retries <n>`: 最大重试次数 (默认: 3)
- `--force`: 跳过确认直接执行恢复操作

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { spawn, ChildProcess } from 'child_process';
2: import * as fs from 'fs';
3: import * as path from 'path';
4: import { AuthBridge } from './auth-bridge';
5: 
6: export interface TraeTaskConfig {
7:   prompt: string;
8:   background?: boolean;
9:   jsonOutput?: boolean;
10:   yolo?: boolean;
11:   allowedTools?: string[];
12:   disallowedTools?: string[];
13:   sessionId?: string;
14:   resume?: string;
15:   worktree?: string;
16:   queryTimeout?: string;
17:   bashToolTimeout?: string;
18:   configOverrides?: Record<string, string>;
19: }
20: 
21: export interface TraeTaskResult {
22:   taskId: string;
23:   output: string;
24:   exitCode: number | null;
25:   sessionId?: string;
26:   duration: number;
27:   jsonOutput?: any;
28: }
29: 
30: const PLUGIN_DIR = path.join(process.cwd(), '.claude-trae-plugin');
31: 
32: function ensurePluginDir() {
33:   if (!fs.existsSync(PLUGIN_DIR)) {
34:     fs.mkdirSync(PLUGIN_DIR, { recursive: true });
35:   }
36: }
37: 
38: export class TraeExecutor {
39:   private authBridge: AuthBridge;
40: 
41:   constructor() {
42:     this.authBridge = new AuthBridge();
43:   }
44: 
45:   async execute(config: TraeTaskConfig): Promise<TraeTaskResult> {
46:     ensurePluginDir();
47: 
48:     const taskId = Date.now().toString();
49:     const logFile = path.join(PLUGIN_DIR, `${taskId}.log`);
50:     const pidFile = path.join(PLUGIN_DIR, `${taskId}.pid`);
51:     const args = this.buildArgs(config);
52:     const env = this.authBridge.buildSpawnEnv();
53:     const startTime = Date.now();
54: 
55:     if (config.background) {
56:       return this.executeBackground(args, env, taskId, logFile, pidFile, startTime);
57:     }
58: 
59:     return this.executeForeground(args, env, taskId, logFile, pidFile, startTime, config.jsonOutput);
60:   }
61: 
62:   private buildArgs(config: TraeTaskConfig): string[] {
63:     const args: string[] = [];
64: 
65:     if (config.allowedTools) {
66:       for (const tool of config.allowedTools) {
67:         args.push('--allowed-tool', tool);
68:       }
69:     }
70: 
71:     if (config.disallowedTools) {
72:       for (const tool of config.disallowedTools) {
73:         args.push('--disallowed-tool', tool);
74:       }
75:     }
76: 
77:     if (config.yolo) args.push('--yolo');
78:     if (config.queryTimeout) args.push('--query-timeout', config.queryTimeout);
79:     if (config.bashToolTimeout) args.push('--bash-tool-timeout', config.bashToolTimeout);
80:     if (config.sessionId) args.push('--session-id', config.sessionId);
81:     if (config.resume) {
82:       if (config.resume === 'AUTO') {
83:         args.push('--resume');
84:       } else {
85:         args.push('--resume', config.resume);
86:       }
87:     }
88:     if (config.worktree) {
89:       if (config.worktree === '__auto__') {
90:         args.push('--worktree');
91:       } else {
92:         args.push('--worktree', config.worktree);
93:       }
94:     }
95: 
96:     if (config.configOverrides) {
97:       for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(config.configOverrides)) {
98:         args.push('-c', `${k}=${v}`);
99:       }
100:     }
101: 
102:     args.push('--print');
103: 
104:     if (config.jsonOutput) {
105:       args.push('--json');
106:     }
107: 
108:     args.push(config.prompt);
109: 
110:     return args;
111:   }
112: 
113:   private executeBackground(
114:     args: string[], env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv, taskId: string,
115:     logFile: string, pidFile: string, startTime: number
116:   ): TraeTaskResult {
117:     const out = fs.openSync(logFile, 'a');
118:     const err = fs.openSync(logFile, 'a');
119: 
120:     const child = spawn('trae-cli', args, {
121:       detached: true,
122:       stdio: ['ignore', out, err],
123:       env,
124:     });
125: 
126:     child.unref();
127: 
128:     if (child.pid) {
129:       fs.writeFileSync(pidFile, child.pid.toString());
130:     }
131: 
132:     return {
133:       taskId,
134:       output: `任务已在后台启动 (ID: ${taskId})\n日志文件: ${logFile}`,
135:       exitCode: null,
136:       duration: Date.now() - startTime,
137:     };
138:   }
139: 
140:   private executeForeground(
141:     args: string[], env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv, taskId: string,
142:     logFile: string, pidFile: string, startTime: number,
143:     parseJson: boolean = false
144:   ): Promise<TraeTaskResult> {
145:     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
146:       const child = spawn('trae-cli', args, {
147:         stdio: ['ignore', 'pipe', 'pipe'],
148:         env,
149:       });
150: 
151:       if (child.pid) {
152:         fs.writeFileSync(pidFile, child.pid.toString());
153:       }
154: 
155:       let combinedOutput = '';
156: 
157:       const append = (chunk: Buffer) => {
158:         const text = chunk.toString();
159:         combinedOutput += text;
160:         fs.appendFileSync(logFile, text);
161:       };
162: 
163:       child.stdout?.on('data', append);
164:       child.stderr?.on('data', append);
165: 
166:       child.on('error', (error) => {
167:         if (fs.existsSync(pidFile)) fs.unlinkSync(pidFile);
168:         reject(new Error(`执行失败: ${error.message}`));
169:       });
170: 
171:       child.on('close', (code) => {
172:         if (fs.existsSync(pidFile)) fs.unlinkSync(pidFile);
173: 
174:         let jsonOutput: any = undefined;
175:         let sessionId: string | undefined;
176: 
177:         if (parseJson && combinedOutput.trim()) {
178:           try {
179:             jsonOutput = JSON.parse(combinedOutput);
180:             sessionId = jsonOutput?.session_id;
181:           } catch {}
182:         }
183: 
184:         resolve({
185:           taskId,
186:           output: combinedOutput,
187:           exitCode: code,
188:           sessionId,
189:           duration: Date.now() - startTime,
190:           jsonOutput,
191:         });
192:       });
193:     });
194:   }
195: }

(End of file - total 195 lines)
</content>

5: export type DataSource = 'file' | 'json' | 'acp';
6: 
7: export interface SessionMeta {

11:   metadata: {

28:     message: {
29:       role: string;

32:         id: string;

35:       }>;
36:     };
37:   };
38:   tool_call?: {

53:   state_update?: {

64: }
65: 
66: export interface ToolCallRecord {
67:   id: string;
68:   name: string;

70:   output?: any;
71:   isError?: boolean;
72:   timestamp: string;
73: }
74: 
75: export interface FileTrackStatus {
76:   [filePath: string]: {
77:     read_time: string;
78:     content: string;
79:   };
80: }
81: 
82: export interface JsonOutputSession {
83:   session_id: string;
84:   messages?: any[];
85:   [key: string]: any;
86: }
87: 
88: export class SessionReader {
89:   private sessionsDir: string;
90:   private historyFile: string;
91:   private jsonOutputCache: Map<string, JsonOutputSession> = new Map();
92: 
93:   constructor() {
94:     const homeDir = os.homedir();
95:     const candidates = [
96:       path.join(homeDir, 'Library', 'Caches', 'trae-cli'),
97:       path.join(homeDir, 'Library', 'Caches', 'trae_cli'),
98:       path.join(homeDir, '.cache', 'trae-cli'),
99:       path.join(homeDir, '.cache', 'trae_cli'),
100:     ];
101: 
102:     const cacheDir = candidates.find(dir => fs.existsSync(dir)) || candidates[0];
103: 
104:     this.sessionsDir = path.join(cacheDir, 'sessions');
105:     this.historyFile = path.join(cacheDir, 'history.jsonl');
106:   }
107: 
108:   listSessions(options?: { cwd?: string; limit?: number }): SessionMeta[] {
109:     if (!fs.existsSync(this.sessionsDir)) return [];
110: 
111:     const sessions = fs.readdirSync(this.sessionsDir)
112:       .filter(dir => {
113:         const sessionFile = path.join(this.sessionsDir, dir, 'session.json');
114:         return fs.existsSync(sessionFile);
115:       })
116:       .map(dir => {
117:         try {
118:           const content = fs.readFileSync(
119:             path.join(this.sessionsDir, dir, 'session.json'),
120:             'utf-8'
121:           );
122:           return JSON.parse(content) as SessionMeta;
123:         } catch {
124:           return null;
125:         }
126:       })
127:       .filter((s): s is SessionMeta => s !== null)
128:       .sort((a, b) =>
129:         new Date(b.updated_at).getTime() - new Date(a.updated_at).getTime()
130:       );
131: 
132:     let filtered = sessions;
133:     if (options?.cwd) {
134:       filtered = filtered.filter(s => s.metadata.cwd === options.cwd);
135:     }
136: 
137:     if (options?.limit) {
138:       filtered = filtered.slice(0, options.limit);
139:     }
140: 
141:     return filtered;
142:   }
143: 
144:   getSession(sessionId: string): SessionMeta | null {
145:     const filePath = path.join(this.sessionsDir, sessionId, 'session.json');
146:     if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) return null;
147:     try {
148:       return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8'));
149:     } catch {
150:       return null;
151:     }
152:   }
153: 
154:   getEvents(sessionId: string): SessionEvent[] {
155:     const filePath = path.join(this.sessionsDir, sessionId, 'events.jsonl');
156:     if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) return [];
157: 
158:     const lines = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8').split('\n');
159:     return lines
160:       .filter(line => line.trim())
161:       .map(line => {
162:         try { return JSON.parse(line) as SessionEvent; }
163:         catch { return null; }
164:       })
165:       .filter((e): e is SessionEvent => e !== null);
166:   }
167: 
168:   getConversation(sessionId: string, options?: { limit?: number }): ConversationMessage[] {
169:     const events = this.getEvents(sessionId);
170:     let messages = events
171:       .filter(e => e.message)
172:       .map(e => {
173:         const msg = e.message!.message;
174:         let content = '';
175:         if (typeof msg.content === 'string') {
176:           content = msg.content;
177:         } else if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
178:           content = msg.content.map(c => c.text || '').join('\n');
179:         }
180: 
181:         return {
182:           role: msg.role,
183:           content,
184:           toolCalls: msg.tool_calls?.map(tc => tc.function.name),
185:           timestamp: e.created_at,
186:         };
187:       });
188: 
189:     if (options?.limit) {
190:       messages = messages.slice(-options.limit);
191:     }
192: 
193:     return messages;
194:   }
195: 
196:   getToolCalls(sessionId: string): ToolCallRecord[] {
197:     const events = this.getEvents(sessionId);
198:     const callMap = new Map<string, ToolCallRecord>();
199: 
200:     for (const e of events) {
201:       if (e.tool_call) {
202:         callMap.set(e.tool_call.tool_call_id, {
203:           id: e.tool_call.tool_call_id,
204:           name: e.tool_call.tool_info.name,
205:           input: e.tool_call.input,
206:           timestamp: e.created_at,
207:         });
208:       }
209:     }
210: 
211:     for (const e of events) {
212:       if (e.tool_call_output) {
213:         const call = callMap.get(e.tool_call_output.tool_call_id);
214:         if (call) {
215:           call.output = e.tool_call_output.output;
216:           call.isError = e.tool_call_output.is_error;
217:         }
218:       }
219:     }
220: 
221:     return Array.from(callMap.values());
222:   }
223: 
224:   getFileTrackStatus(sessionId: string): FileTrackStatus {
225:     const events = this.getEvents(sessionId);
226:     for (const e of events) {
227:       if (e.state_update?.updates?.file_track_status) {
228:         return e.state_update.updates.file_track_status;
229:       }
230:     }
231:     return {};
232:   }
233: 
234:   getRecentSession(cwd?: string): SessionMeta | null {
235:     const sessions = this.listSessions({ cwd });
236:     return sessions[0] || null;
237:   }
238: 
239:   findSessionByTopic(topic: string): SessionMeta | null {
240:     const sessions = this.listSessions();
241:     const match = sessions.find(s =>
242:       s.metadata.title.toLowerCase().includes(topic.toLowerCase())
243:     );
244:     return match || null;
245:   }
246: 
247:   getContextSummary(sessionId: string): string {
248:     const meta = this.getSession(sessionId);
249:     if (!meta) return '会话不存在';
250: 
251:     const conversation = this.getConversation(sessionId, { limit: 20 });
252:     const toolCalls = this.getToolCalls(sessionId);
253: 
254:     let summary = `## 会话: ${meta.metadata.title}\n`;
255:     summary += `- ID: ${meta.id}\n`;
256:     summary += `- 工作目录: ${meta.metadata.cwd}\n`;
257:     summary += `- 模型: ${meta.metadata.model_name}\n`;
258:     summary += `- 权限模式: ${meta.metadata.permission_mode}\n`;
259:     summary += `- 创建时间: ${meta.created_at}\n`;
260:     summary += `- 更新时间: ${meta.updated_at}\n\n`;
261: 
262:     summary += `### 最近对话 (${conversation.length} 条消息)\n`;
263:     for (const msg of conversation) {
264:       const content = msg.content.length > 200
265:         ? msg.content.substring(0, 200) + '...'
266:         : msg.content;
267:       summary += `**${msg.role}**: ${content}`;
268:       if (msg.toolCalls?.length) {
269:         summary += ` [调用工具: ${msg.toolCalls.join(', ')}]`;
270:       }
271:       summary += '\n\n';
272:     }
273: 
274:     summary += `### 工具调用统计 (${toolCalls.length} 次)\n`;
275:     const toolStats: Record<string, number> = {};
276:     for (const tc of toolCalls) {
277:       toolStats[tc.name] = (toolStats[tc.name] || 0) + 1;
278:     }
279:     for (const [name, count] of Object.entries(toolStats)) {
280:       summary += `- ${name}: ${count} 次\n`;
281:     }
282: 
283:     return summary;
284:   }
285: 
286:   getHistory(): Array<{ content: string; mode: string; timestamp: string }> {
287:     if (!fs.existsSync(this.historyFile)) return [];
288: 
289:     const lines = fs.readFileSync(this.historyFile, 'utf-8').split('\n');
290:     return lines
291:       .filter(line => line.trim())
292:       .map(line => {
293:         try { return JSON.parse(line); }
294:         catch { return null; }
295:       })
296:       .filter((h): h is { content: string; mode: string; timestamp: string } => h !== null);
297:   }
298: 
299:   deleteSession(sessionId: string): boolean {
300:     const sessionDir = path.join(this.sessionsDir, sessionId);
301:     if (!fs.existsSync(sessionDir)) return false;
302: 
303:     try {
304:       fs.rmSync(sessionDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
305:       return true;
306:     } catch {
307:       return false;
308:     }
309:   }
310: 
311:   cacheJsonOutput(sessionId: string, output: JsonOutputSession): void {
312:     this.jsonOutputCache.set(sessionId, output);
313:   }
314: 
315:   getJsonOutputSession(sessionId: string): JsonOutputSession | null {
316:     return this.jsonOutputCache.get(sessionId) || null;
317:   }
318: 
319:   getSessionsDir(): string {
320:     return this.sessionsDir;
321:   }
322: }

57: export async function runTraeCli(prompt: string, background: boolean = false): Promise<string> {

59:   const env = getTraeCliEnv();
60:   const timestamp = Date.now();
61:   const logFile = path.join(PLUGIN_DIR, `${timestamp}.log`);
62:   const pidFile = path.join(PLUGIN_DIR, `${timestamp}.pid`);
63: 
64:   if (background) {
65:     const out = fs.openSync(logFile, 'a');
66:     const err = fs.openSync(logFile, 'a');
67: 
68:     const child = spawn('trae-cli', ['--print', prompt], {
69:       detached: true,
70:       stdio: ['ignore', out, err],
71:       env,
72:     });
73: 
74:     child.unref();
75: 
76:     if (child.pid) {
77:       fs.writeFileSync(pidFile, child.pid.toString());

96:       const text = chunk.toString();
97:       combinedOutput += text;
98:       fs.appendFileSync(logFile, text);
99:       if (isErr) {
100:         process.stderr.write(chunk);
101:       } else {
102:         process.stdout.write(chunk);
103:       }
104:     };
105: 
106:     child.stdout?.on('data', (chunk: Buffer) => append(chunk, false));
107:     child.stderr?.on('data', (chunk: Buffer) => append(chunk, true));
108: 
109:     child.on('error', (error) => {
110:       if (fs.existsSync(pidFile)) fs.unlinkSync(pidFile);
111:       reject(new Error(`执行失败: ${error.message}`));
112:     });
113: 
114:     child.on('close', (code) => {
115:       if (fs.existsSync(pidFile)) fs.unlinkSync(pidFile);
116:       if (code === 0) {
117:         resolve(combinedOutput);
118:       } else {
119:         reject(new Error(`执行失败: trae-cli 退出码 ${code}。日志: ${logFile}`));
120:       }
121:     });
122:   });
123: }

8: export class ContextBridge {

15:   buildResumedPrompt(
16:     sessionId: string,
17:     newTask: string
18:   ): ResumedPrompt {
19:     const context = this.sessionReader.getContextSummary(sessionId);
20:     const lastMessages = this.sessionReader.getConversation(sessionId, { limit: 5 });
21: 
22:     let contextPreview = `## 恢复会话 ${sessionId}\n\n`;
23:     contextPreview += `### 最近对话:\n`;

27:         : msg.content;
28:       contextPreview += `- **${msg.role}**: ${preview}\n`;
29:     }
30: 
31:     return {
32:       args: ['--resume', sessionId, '--print', newTask],

35: 
36: export class AcpClient {
37:   private baseUrl: string;
38: 
39:   constructor(baseUrl: string = 'http://localhost:8000') {
40:     this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
41:   }
42: 
43:   async discoverAgents(): Promise<AcpAgentInfo[]> {
44:     try {
45:       const result = await this.request('GET', '/agents');
46:       return result.agents || [];
47:     } catch {
48:       return [];
49:     }
50:   }
51: 
52:   async runAgent(req: AcpRunRequest): Promise<AcpRunResponse> {
53:     return this.request('POST', '/runs', req);
54:   }
55: 
56:   async getRun(runId: string): Promise<AcpRunResponse> {
57:     return this.request('GET', `/runs/${runId}`);
58:   }
59: 
60:   async runStream(
61:     req: AcpRunRequest,
62:     onEvent: (event: any) => void
63:   ): Promise<void> {
64:     const url = new URL('/runs/stream', this.baseUrl);
65:     const payload = JSON.stringify(req);
66: 
67:     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
68:       const options = {
69:         hostname: url.hostname,
70:         port: url.port || 80,
71:         path: url.pathname,
72:         method: 'POST',
73:         headers: {
74:           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
75:           'Accept': 'text/event-stream',
76:           'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload),
77:         },
78:       };
79: 
80:       const httpReq = http.request(options, (res) => {
81:         let buffer = '';
82:         res.on('data', (chunk) => {
83:           buffer += chunk.toString();
84:           const lines = buffer.split('\n');
85:           buffer = lines.pop() || '';
86:           for (const line of lines) {
87:             if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
88:               try {
89:                 onEvent(JSON.parse(line.substring(6)));
90:               } catch {}
91:             }
92:           }
93:         });
94:         res.on('end', resolve);
95:         res.on('error', reject);
96:       });
97: 
98:       httpReq.on('error', reject);
99:       httpReq.write(payload);
100:       httpReq.end();
101:     });
102:   }
103: 
104:   async healthCheck(): Promise<boolean> {
105:     try {
106:       await this.request('GET', '/agents');
107:       return true;
108:     } catch {
109:       return false;
110:     }
111:   }
112: 
113:   private request(method: string, urlPath: string, body?: any): Promise<any> {
114:     const url = new URL(urlPath, this.baseUrl);
115: 
116:     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
117:       const options: http.RequestOptions = {
118:         hostname: url.hostname,
119:         port: url.port || 80,
120:         path: url.pathname + url.search,
121:         method,
122:         headers: {},
123:       };
124: 
125:       if (body) {
126:         const payload = JSON.stringify(body);
127:         options.headers = {
128:           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
129:           'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload),
130:         };
131:       }
132: 
133:       const req = http.request(options, (res) => {
134:         let data = '';
135:         res.on('data', (chunk) => { data += chunk; });
136:         res.on('end', () => {
137:           try { resolve(JSON.parse(data)); }
138:           catch { resolve(data); }
139:         });
140:       });
141: 
142:       req.on('error', reject);
143:       if (body) req.write(JSON.stringify(body));
144:       req.end();
145:     });
146:   }
147: }

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { spawn, ChildProcess } from 'child_process';
2: import { AcpClient } from '../utils/acp-client';
3: 
4: type StartupEvent = {
5:   at: string;
6:   event: string;
7:   detail?: string;
8: };
9: 
10: export class AcpServerManager {
11:   private process: ChildProcess | null = null;
12:   private port: number = 0;
13:   private client: AcpClient | null = null;
14: 
15:   async start(options?: { yolo?: boolean; allowedTools?: string[]; disabledTools?: string[] }): Promise<{
16:     port: number;
17:     baseUrl: string;
18:   }> {
19:     if (this.isRunning()) {
20:       return {
21:         port: this.port,
22:         baseUrl: `http://localhost:${this.port}`,
23:       };
24:     }
25: 
26:     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
27:       const args: string[] = ['acp', 'serve'];
28: 
29:       if (options?.yolo) args.push('--yolo');
30:       if (options?.allowedTools) {
31:         for (const tool of options.allowedTools) {
32:           args.push('--allowed-tool', tool);
33:         }
34:       }
35:       if (options?.disabledTools) {
36:         for (const tool of options.disabledTools) {
37:           args.push('--disabled-tool', tool);
38:         }
39:       }
40: 
41:       const startupEvents: StartupEvent[] = [];
42:       const outputSnippets: string[] = [];
43:       let started = false;
44:       let settled = false;
45:       let firstStdoutSeen = false;
46:       let firstStderrSeen = false;
47: 
48:       const recordEvent = (event: string, detail?: string) => {
49:         startupEvents.push({
50:           at: new Date().toISOString(),
51:           event,
52:           detail,
53:         });
54:       };
55: 
56:       const rememberOutput = (source: 'stdout' | 'stderr', text: string) => {
57:         const normalized = text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
58:         if (!normalized) return;
59:         outputSnippets.push(`[${source}] ${normalized}`);
60:         if (outputSnippets.length > 8) outputSnippets.shift();
61:       };
62: 
63:       const buildDiagnostic = () => {
64:         const trace = startupEvents
65:           .map((item, idx) => `${idx + 1}. ${item.at} ${item.event}${item.detail ? ` | ${item.detail}` : ''}`)
66:           .join('\n');
67:         const recentOutput = outputSnippets.length > 0
68:           ? outputSnippets.map((line, idx) => `${idx + 1}. ${line}`).join('\n')
69:           : 'none';
70:         return `\n[ACP] startup diagnostics\ntrace:\n${trace || 'none'}\nrecent_output:\n${recentOutput}`;
71:       };
72: 
73:       const fail = (message: string) => {
74:         if (settled) return;
75:         settled = true;
76:         reject(new Error(`${message}${buildDiagnostic()}`));
77:       };
78: 
79:       const succeed = (port: number) => {
80:         if (settled) return;
81:         settled = true;
82:         resolve({
83:           port,
84:           baseUrl: `http://localhost:${port}`,
85:         });
86:       };
87: 
88:       // 设置环境变量，支持 PAT 认证和 trae-cli 路径
89:       const env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = { ...process.env };
90:       const homeBin = require('path').join(require('os').homedir(), '.local', 'bin');
91:       const existingPath = env.PATH || '';
92:       if (!existingPath.split(':').includes(homeBin)) {
93:         env.PATH = `${homeBin}:${existingPath}`;
94:       }
95:       if (process.env.TRAECLI_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN) {
96:         env.TRAECLI_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN = process.env.TRAECLI_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN;
97:       }
98: 
99:       recordEvent('spawn:start', `cmd=trae-cli ${args.join(' ')}`);
100: 
101:       const child = spawn('trae-cli', args, {
102:         stdio: ['ignore', 'pipe', 'pipe'],
103:         env,
104:       });
105: 
106:       recordEvent('spawn:created', `pid=${child.pid || 'unknown'}`);
107: 
108:       const detectPort = (text: string, source: 'stdout' | 'stderr') => {
109:         rememberOutput(source, text);
110: 
111:         const portMatch = text.match(/listening.*?:(\d+)/i) ||
112:                           text.match(/port.*?(\d+)/i) ||
113:                           text.match(/http:\/\/localhost:(\d+)/i) ||
114:                           text.match(/:(\d{4,5})/);
115:         if (portMatch && !started) {
116:           started = true;
117:           this.port = parseInt(portMatch[1], 10);
118:           this.process = child;
119:           this.client = new AcpClient(`http://localhost:${this.port}`);
120:           recordEvent('port:detected', `source=${source}, port=${this.port}`);
121:           succeed(this.port);
122:         }
123:       };
124: 
125:       child.stdout?.on('data', (chunk: Buffer) => {
126:         if (!firstStdoutSeen) {
127:           firstStdoutSeen = true;
128:           recordEvent('stdout:first-chunk');
129:         }
130:         detectPort(chunk.toString(), 'stdout');
131:       });
132: 
133:       child.stderr?.on('data', (chunk: Buffer) => {
134:         if (!firstStderrSeen) {
135:           firstStderrSeen = true;
136:           recordEvent('stderr:first-chunk');
137:         }
138:         detectPort(chunk.toString(), 'stderr');
139:       });
140: 
141:       child.on('error', (err) => {
142:         recordEvent('process:error', err.message);
143:         fail(`ACP server spawn failed: ${err.message}`);
144:       });
145: 
146:       child.on('close', (code, signal) => {
147:         recordEvent('process:close', `code=${code ?? 'null'}, signal=${signal ?? 'null'}`);
148:         this.process = null;
149:         if (!started) {
150:           fail(`ACP server exited before port detected (code=${code ?? 'null'}, signal=${signal ?? 'null'})`);
151:         }
152:       });
153: 
154:       setTimeout(() => {
155:         if (!started && !settled) {
156:           const alive = child.exitCode === null;
157:           recordEvent('startup:timeout', `alive=${alive}, exitCode=${child.exitCode ?? 'null'}, signalCode=${child.signalCode ?? 'null'}`);
158: 
159:           if (alive) {
160:             child.kill('SIGTERM');
161:             fail('ACP server process is alive but no port was detected within 15s');
162:             return;
163:           }
164: 
165:           fail('ACP server startup timeout (15s)');
166:         }
167:       }, 15000);
168:     });
169:   }
170: 
171:   async stop(): Promise<void> {
172:     if (this.process) {
173:       this.process.kill('SIGTERM');
174:       await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
175:         setTimeout(() => {
176:           if (this.process) {
177:             this.process.kill('SIGKILL');
178:           }
179:           resolve();
180:         }, 3000);
181:       });
182:       this.process = null;
183:       this.port = 0;
184:       this.client = null;
185:     }
186:   }
187: 
188:   isRunning(): boolean {
189:     return this.process !== null && this.process.exitCode === null;
190:   }
191: 
192:   getPort(): number {
193:     return this.port;
194:   }
195: 
196:   getClient(): AcpClient | null {
197:     return this.client;
198:   }
199: 
200:   getStatus(): {
201:     running: boolean;
202:     port: number;
203:     baseUrl: string;
204:   } {
205:     return {
206:       running: this.isRunning(),
207:       port: this.port,
208:       baseUrl: this.port ? `http://localhost:${this.port}` : '',
209:     };
210:   }
211: }

(End of file - total 211 lines)
</content>

1: import { execSync } from 'child_process';
2: 
3: export interface DiffEstimate {
4:   baseBranch: string;
5:   linesAdded: number;
6:   linesDeleted: number;
7:   filesChanged: number;
8:   untrackedFiles: string[];
9:   estimatedTime: 'quick' | 'moderate' | 'lengthy' | 'very_large';
10:   recommendation: {
11:     useBackground: boolean;
12:     reason: string;
13:   };
14: }
15: 
16: export async function detectBaseBranch(): Promise<string> {
17:   const commonBranches = ['main', 'master', 'develop', 'dev', 'mainline'];
18: 
19:   // Check current branch's upstream
20:   try {
21:     const upstream = execSync('git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u}', {
22:       encoding: 'utf-8'
23:     }).trim();
24: 
25:     if (upstream) {
26:       const base = upstream.split('/').pop();
27:       if (base && commonBranches.includes(base.toLowerCase())) {
28:         return base;
29:       }
30:     }
31:   } catch {
32:     // Ignore
33:   }
34: 
35:   // Check if current branch is one of common branches
36:   try {
37:     const currentBranch = execSync('git branch --show-current', { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim();
38:     if (commonBranches.includes(currentBranch.toLowerCase())) {
39:       return 'main';
40:     }
41:   } catch {
42:     // Ignore
43:   }
44: 
45:   // Try to find default branch from remote
46:   try {
47:     const remoteDefault = execSync('git remote show origin | grep "HEAD branch" | sed "s/.*: //"', {
48:       encoding: 'utf-8'
49:     }).trim();
50: 
51:     if (remoteDefault) {
52:       return remoteDefault;
53:     }
54:   } catch {
55:     // Ignore
56:   }
57: 
58:   // Fallback to common branches
59:   for (const branch of commonBranches) {
60:     try {
61:       execSync(`git rev-parse --verify ${branch}`, { stdio: 'ignore' });
62:       return branch;
63:     } catch {
64:       continue;
65:     }
66:   }
67: 
68:   return 'main';
69: }
70: 
71: export async function getUntrackedFiles(): Promise<string[]> {
72:   try {
73:     const output = execSync('git status --porcelain', { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim();
74:     if (!output) return [];
75: 
76:     return output
77:       .split('\n')
78:       .filter(line => line.startsWith('??'))
79:       .map(line => line.substring(3).trim());
80:   } catch {
81:     return [];
82:   }
83: }
84: 
85: export async function estimateReviewSize(baseBranch: string): Promise<DiffEstimate> {
86:   let linesAdded = 0;
87:   let linesDeleted = 0;
88:   let filesChanged = 0;
89: 
90:   // Get diff stats - using fixed commands only
91:   try {
92:     const diffStats = execSync(`git diff --shortstat ${baseBranch}...HEAD`, {
93:       encoding: 'utf-8'
94:     }).trim();
95: 
96:     if (diffStats) {
97:       const match = diffStats.match(/(\d+)\s+files? changed.*?(\d+)\s+insertions.*?(\d+)\s+deletions/);
98:       if (match) {
99:         filesChanged = parseInt(match[1]) || 0;
100:         linesAdded = parseInt(match[2]) || 0;
101:         linesDeleted = parseInt(match[3]) || 0;
102:       }
103:     }
104:   } catch {
105:     // Fallback to unstaged
106:     try {
107:       const diffStats = execSync('git diff --shortstat', { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim();
108:       if (diffStats) {
109:         const match = diffStats.match(/(\d+)\s+files? changed/);
110:         if (match) {
111:           filesChanged = parseInt(match[1]) || 0;
112:         }
113:       }
114:     } catch {
115:       // Ignore
116:     }
117:   }
118: 
119:   // Get untracked files
120:   const untrackedFiles = await getUntrackedFiles();
121:   const totalChanges = linesAdded + linesDeleted;
122: 
123:   // Determine estimated time
124:   let estimatedTime: DiffEstimate['estimatedTime'];
125:   if (totalChanges < 100) {
126:     estimatedTime = 'quick';
127:   } else if (totalChanges < 500) {
128:     estimatedTime = 'moderate';
129:   } else if (totalChanges < 2000) {
130:     estimatedTime = 'lengthy';
131:   } else {
132:     estimatedTime = 'very_large';
133:   }
134: 
135:   // Determine recommendation - based on tracked changes, not untracked
136:   let useBackground = false;
137:   let reason = '';
138: 
139:   if (totalChanges < 100) {
140:     useBackground = false;
141:     reason = '变更较小，可以同步等待';
142:   } else if (totalChanges < 500) {
143:     useBackground = true;
144:     reason = '变更适中，建议后台运行';
145:   } else if (totalChanges < 2000) {
146:     useBackground = true;
147:     reason = '变更较大，建议后台运行';
148:   } else {
149:     useBackground = true;
150:     reason = '变更非常大，建议后台运行或拆分审查';
151:   }
152: 
153:   return {
154:     baseBranch,
155:     linesAdded,
156:     linesDeleted,
157:     filesChanged,
158:     untrackedFiles,
159:     estimatedTime,
160:     recommendation: { useBackground, reason }
161:   };
162: }
163: 
164: export function formatEstimate(estimate: DiffEstimate): string {
165:   const lines = [
166:     '📊 审查估算:',
167:     `   基准分支: ${estimate.baseBranch}`,
168:     `   变更: +${estimate.linesAdded} -${estimate.linesDeleted} 行`,
169:     `   文件: ${estimate.filesChanged} 个`,
170:   ];
171: 
172:   if (estimate.untrackedFiles.length > 0) {
173:     lines.push(`   未跟踪: ${estimate.untrackedFiles.length} 个文件`);
174:   }
175: 
176:   const timeMap = {
177:     quick: '快速 (1-2分钟)',
178:     moderate: '中等 (5-10分钟)',
179:     lengthy: '较长 (10-30分钟)',
180:     very_large: '非常长 (30分钟+)'
181:   };
182: 
183:   lines.push(`   预计时间: ${timeMap[estimate.estimatedTime]}`);
184:   lines.push('');
185:   lines.push(`💡 建议: ${estimate.recommendation.reason}`);
186: 
187:   return lines.join('\n');
188: }

(End of file - total 188 lines)
</content>

42:   },
43:   async execute(args, context) {
44:     const cliArgs: string[] = ["node", DIST_INDEX, "run"]
45: 
46:     cliArgs.push(args.prompt)
47:     if (args.resume) cliArgs.push("--resume", args.resume)
48:     if (args.session_id) cliArgs.push("--session-id", args.session_id)
49:     if (args.yolo) cliArgs.push("--yolo")
50:     if (args.allowed_tools)
51:       for (const t of args.allowed_tools) cliArgs.push("--allowed-tool", t)

60:     if (args.inject_context)
61:       cliArgs.push("--inject-context", args.inject_context)
62: 
63:     const result = await $`${cliArgs}`.cwd(PLUGIN_DIR).quiet()
64:     return {
65:       text: result.stdout,
66:     }
67:   },
68: })
